name: ReLope: KL-Regularized LoRA Probes for Multimodal LLM Routing

description: arXiv:2603.24787v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Routing has emerged as a promising strategy for balancing performance and cost in large language model (LLM) systems that combine lightweight models with powerful but expensive large models. Recent studies show that \emph{probe routing}, which predicts the correctness of a small model using its hidden states, provides an effective solution in...
author: Yaopei Zeng, Congchao Wang, Blake JianHang Chen, Lu Lin
